economic_notes: Band holds investments in multiple government business enterprises including Kalum Quarry, Kalum Gas Bar, Kitsumkalum Development, Kalum Logistics Park, Kasiks Wilderness Resort, Kitsumkalum Economic Development Group Ltd., Kalum Ventures Ltd., and Kalum Ventures Limited Partnership. Port of Prince Rupert Container Terminal Project Agreement trust fund for economic development. Kalum Land Holdings Corporation holds off-reserve land with landfill and quarry.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED for three reasons: (1) no budget prepared as required by PSAB standards, (2) financial statements not available for Kalum Ventures Ltd. and Kalum Ventures Limited Partnership so GBE investment amounts are uncertain, (3) no asset retirement obligation assessment completed for landfill and quarry held through Kalum Land Holdings Corporation. Three consolidated subsidiaries: Kitsumkalum Treaty Administration, Kitsumkalum Social Housing, House of Sim-Oi-Ghets. Eight GBEs accounted for under modified equity method. GBE investments showing net loss of $1,164,477 in 2024 vs gain of $251,997 in 2023. Consolidated statement of financial position balance sheet details not fully provided in extracted text so current liabilities, deferred revenue, long-term debt and tangible capital assets cannot be confirmed. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + Province of BC + DFO + FNHA + CMHC + Transport Canada = 12,305,895 + 8,847,470 + 1,793,895 + 1,612,849 + 196,345 + 85,224 = 24,841,678. OSR = economic activities + other own-source + investment income + rental income + GBE earnings = 3,025,618 + 2,569,109 + 1,371,428 + 235,940 + (-1,164,477) = 6,037,618.
